cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which statement is NOT true based on the text about Bobby Moresco. First, I'll go through each option one by one. Option A: "His father did not support his work as a bartender." Wait, the text says that when Moresco moved to Hollywood, he drove a cab and worked as a waiter. His father told him to "Stop this craziness and get a job..." So the father was against his acting career, not specifically the job as a waiter or bartender. The text doesn't mention a bartender; it mentions a waiter. But the key here is whether the father supported or not supported his work in those jobs.
